shared_attributes.features: short front legs, large eyes, thick tail

context.role: Player character default running state during active gameplay
context.screen_position: Fixed at x=100px from left edge, y=0 (ground level)
context.usage_scenario: Primary animation during gameplay when player is grounded and not ducking

animation.description: Running cycle - Frame 1: left leg forward, Frame 2: right leg forward, seamless loop at 12 FPS

visual_specification.details: Alternating leg positions, body slightly leaning forward, tail extended back for balance

relationships.shared_with: Same base sprite as player_idle but faster animation
relationships.differences_from: player_idle has slower FPS (6 vs 12), player_duck has different dimensions (118x60px)

explicit_negations: No motion blur or speed lines
No dust particles or environmental effects
No color variations based on speed
